seoTitle: Eastbrook vs Eden Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eastbrook and Eden Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Eastbrook vs Eden Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eastbrook and Eden Hill.
heading: Eastbrook vs Eden Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eastbrook, Western Australia and Eden Hill, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eastbrook has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Eden Hill (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eastbrook or Eden Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eastbrook has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Eden Hill scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eastbrook scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Eden Hill scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eastbrook or Eden Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eastbrook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
